name: GST Reduced Glutathione Elution Buffer
nameCn: GST 还原型谷胱甘肽洗脱液

notes.en: Prepare fresh; reduced glutathione oxidizes rapidly. Adjust pH to 8.0. Eluted fractions contain free glutathione — remove by dialysis if downstream assays are sensitive. Some protocols use 15–50 mM GSH for higher yield.
notes.zh: 需新鲜配制，还原型谷胱甘肽容易氧化。pH 调至 8.0。洗脱液含游离谷胱甘肽，下游分析敏感时需透析去除。部分方案用 15–50 mM GSH 以提高产量。

usage.en: Elute GST-tagged fusion proteins from glutathione agarose/Sepharose affinity resin under native conditions.
usage.zh: 在非变性条件下从谷胱甘肽琼脂糖/Sepharose 亲和树脂上洗脱 GST 标签融合蛋白。

storage.notes: Reduced glutathione oxidizes within hours at RT; prepare fresh and keep on ice

prepSteps.en: Dissolve NaCl (0.44 g) in ~40 mL ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: 将 NaCl（0.44 g）溶于约 40 mL ddH₂O 中。

prepSteps.en: Add 2.5 mL of 1 M Tris-HCl pH 8.0.
prepSteps.zh: 加入 2.5 mL 1 M Tris-HCl pH 8.0。

prepSteps.en: Add reduced glutathione (0.154 g for 10 mM final). Mix until dissolved.
prepSteps.zh: 加入还原型谷胱甘肽（0.154 g，终浓度 10 mM）。混匀至溶解。

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 8.0 with NaOH if necessary.
prepSteps.zh: 必要时用 NaOH 调 pH 至 8.0。

prepSteps.en: Bring to 50 mL with ddH₂O. Use immediately or keep on ice ≤2 h.
prepSteps.zh: 用 ddH₂O 定容至 50 mL。立即使用或冰上保存 ≤2 h。

ref: GE Healthcare Glutathione Sepharose 4B Instruction 71-5027-67 EK; Harper & Speicher (2011) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 6.6.1
